title: Methodik – Das (junge) Publikum über die Landwirtschaft aufklären und informieren – „Fro de Bauer“ (Frag den Landwirt)
description: A methodological guide for the Fro de Bauer project aimed at educating young audiences about modern agriculture. It outlines a school-based program, awareness campaigns, and interactive materials to promote understanding of food production and social resilience.
